onboarding.scrimDismissBlocked: Initialization incomplete. Please execute baseline calibration.

phase1.body: System wake complete. Chassis standby—ready to squeeze out your max horsepower.

profileInput.body: Enter sex, age, height, and weight to lock your six-axis baseline.
profileInput.lockHint: Chassis parameters unwritten. Save telemetry to unlock boot sequence.

baseline.protocolDesc: Six axes from the sports-science engine; parameters lock all later benchmarks.
baseline.authorityFooter: ⚠️ Scores benchmark live data—straight to raw Dyno on boot.

strength.label: STRENGTH / MAX HP
strength.desc: DOTS neutralizes weight bias; pure structural output.

cardio.label: CARDIO / ENDURANCE
cardio.desc: Cooper dual-track aerobic and VO2 Max projection.

skeletalMuscle.label: EXTERIOR / CHSS
skeletalMuscle.desc: SMM benchmarks map chassis lines and structure.

ffmi.label: DISPLACEMENT / P2W
ffmi.desc: Fat-free mass index decouples height and body-fat bias.

explosive.label: TORQUE / TRQ
explosive.desc: Transient burst power; launch torque readout.

grip.label: GRIP / TIRE GRIP
grip.desc: CNS-to-extremity conduction; grip and control output.

phase2.body: Six-axis cluster ready—your output, your rules.

phase3.body: Enter the Dyno—commit threshold data and start baseline calibration.
